seoTitle: Dhulura vs Dhuragoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dhulura and Dhuragoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dhulura and Dhuragoon.
heading: Dhulura vs Dhuragoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dhulura, New South Wales and Dhuragoon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dhuragoon has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Dhulura (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dhulura or Dhuragoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dhulura has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Dhuragoon scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dhulura scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Dhuragoon scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dhulura or Dhuragoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dhuragoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
